intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps users optimize their web pages for AI search and traditional SEO. It provides actionable insights and recommendations to improve visibility and performance.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Easily see all analyzed pages of your website at a glance, with the weakest pages listed first for quick action.

highlights.title: Direct Recommendations
highlights.description: Get tailored suggestions right under your score, highlighting the most impactful areas for improvement.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Guidance
highlights.description: Instead of error messages, receive friendly instructions on what to do next when switching pages.

highlights.title: In-Page Issue Highlighting
highlights.description: Visually identify issues directly on your page with markers that guide you to the areas needing attention.

highlights.title: Canonical Tag Checks
highlights.description: Ensure your canonical tags are correctly set up to avoid SEO pitfalls, with clear color-coded statuses.

highlights.title: Readability Scores
highlights.description: Assess the readability of your content with scores that help you simplify complex texts for better engagement.

highlights.title: International Language Support
highlights.description: The extension now supports multiple languages, making it accessible for a wider audience.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly generate and copy code snippets to implement recommended changes without hassle.
